frames.description: Street view of an urban area with shops. On the left, 'GOLDEN WATCH CO.' (ଗୋଲ୍ଡେନ୍ ୱାଚ୍ କୋ.) offers sales and service for all types of batteries. In the center is 'ARUN ELECTRICALS' (ଅରୁଣ ଇଲେକ୍ଟ୍ରିକାଲ୍ସ) with a prominent 'ANCHOR by Panasonic' sign. A man in a blue shirt is walking on the left, and a woman in a colorful saree is near the watch shop. Overhanging power lines are visible.

Moving forward, 'ARUN ELECTRICALS' is now on the left. Next to it, a green building features a sign for 'PRADHAN GUJARATI MIXTURE & SWEETS' (ପ୍ରଧାନ ଗୁଜୁରାଟୀ ମିକ୍ସଚର ଆଣ୍ଡ ସୁଇଟ୍ସ). Further right, 'SRI RAGHAV MEDICINE STORE' (ଶ୍ରୀ ରାଘବ ମେଡିସିନ୍ ଷ୍ଟୋର) is visible. A woman is sitting on the ground, and a bicycle is parked nearby.

A closer view of 'SRI RAGHAV MEDICINE STORE' (ଶ୍ରୀ ରାଘବ ମେଡିସିନ୍ ଷ୍ଟୋର), which also identifies as a 'CHEMIST & DRUGGIST'. Above it, a sign for a 'BEAUTY PARLOUR' (ବ୍ୟୁଟି ପାର୍ଲର) is seen. A woman in a red saree is at the shop entrance, and several motorcycles are parked in the foreground. A doctor's name, 'Dr. R.N. Panda', is on a small sign.

Panning right, the 'SRI RAGHAV MEDICINE STORE' is on the left. Beside it is a shop with a sign for 'KALYANI MOBILE REPAIRING' (କଲ୍ୟାଣୀ ମୋବାଇଲ ରିପ୍ୟାରିଂ), also offering 'XEROX' services. Men are standing and working near the shops.

The scene continues right, showing 'KALYANI MOBILE REPAIRING' and 'SAGAR STORE' with a 'Bisleri' advertisement. A large billboard for 'SUM ULTIMATE MEDICARE' is visible above the buildings. A man in a yellow and white shirt and a woman in a blue saree are walking past. A man is sitting on the right side.

Moving along the street, 'PABITRA VARIETY STORE' (ପବିତ୍ର ଭେରାଇଟି ଷ୍ଟୋର) is seen on the left. Next is 'HOTEL NILAKANTHESWAR' (ହୋଟେଲ ନୀଳକଣ୍ଠେଶ୍ୱର), which serves Indian and Tandoori food. A man is sitting on a bench on the far left.

A shop selling 'Softline WOMENSWEAR' and 'Madam's Choice' (ମାଡାମ୍ସ ଚଏସ) is shown. A woman in a light-colored outfit is walking toward the left. Various signs and posters are affixed to the shop's facade.

The focus is on 'HEART LINE PHARMACEUTICALS' (ହାର୍ଟ ଲାଇନ ଫାର୍ମାସ୍ୟୁଟିକାଲ୍ସ), a chemist and druggist store. A political poster for the BJP with images of leaders is visible on the right. The shop's shutter is closed.

Next is 'RABEENDRA MEDICINE STORE' (ରବୀନ୍ଦ୍ର ମେଡିସିନ୍ ଷ୍ଟୋର), with its sign in English, Odia, and Hindi. To its left, a board mentions 'ASHOK KUMAR MALLICK', a doctor at S.C.B. Medical College. A man is visible inside the pharmacy.

This frame shows several medical establishments side-by-side: 'SANGAM MEDICAL HALL' (ସଙ୍ଗମ ମେଡିକାଲ ହଲ), 'RADHIKA MEDICALS' (ରାଧିକା ମେଡିକାଲ୍ସ), and 'KISHORE DIAGNOSTICS (P) LTD.' (କିଶୋର ଡାଇଗ୍ନୋଷ୍ଟିକ (ପ୍ରା) ଲିଃ.). People are inside the shops, and a woman in a red saree stands on the right. Several motorcycles are parked in front.

A closer view of 'KISHORE DIAGNOSTICS (P) LTD.' and adjacent medical clinics. A group of people, some wearing helmets, is gathered on the sidewalk. Clinic signs include 'Dr. Rohit Chhirolya' and 'SHREE BINAYAK CLINIC' (ଶ୍ରୀ ବିନାୟକ କ୍ଲିନିକ).

The camera pans further right to 'SHREE BINAYAK CLINIC' (ଶ୍ରୀ ବିନାୟକ କ୍ଲିନିକ), located on Medical Road, Ranihat, Cuttack. In the foreground, a board is covered with 'PLOT FOR SALE' notices. A scooter is parked nearby.

The street view continues with clinics and medicine stores. Signs for 'DR. TRILOCHAN PANDA' (ଡା. ତ୍ରିଲୋଚନ ପଣ୍ଡା) and 'MAA DURGA MEDICINE STORE' (ମା' ଦୁର୍ଗା ମେଡିସିନ୍ ଷ୍ଟୋର) are visible. Several men are standing on the sidewalk near parked motorcycles and a silver car.

Visible is 'ASHIRVAD GUEST HOUSE' (ଆଶୀର୍ବାଦ ଗେଷ୍ଟ ହାଉସ), which offers comfortable and economic stays. Below it is 'SURAKSHA MEDICINE STORE' (ସୁରକ୍ଷା ମେଡିସିନ୍ ଷ୍ଟୋର). A man in a blue checked shirt walks left, and another man sits near the pharmacy entrance. Motorcycles are parked along the edge.

This frame shows 'HARI OMM DRUG HOUSE' (ହରି ଓମ୍ ଡ୍ରଗ ହାଉସ) and a clinic sign for 'DR. DEBJANI DAS' (ଡା. ଦେବଜାନୀ ଦାସ). A shop on the left displays signs for orthopedic and medical aids. Parked motorcycles are visible in the foreground.

The view transitions to residential buildings with ground-floor shops. A person is seen on a balcony. Below, several political posters are on a pole. A man is inside a small store, and another man stands by his scooter. Several parked scooters are visible.

Signs for 'SHREE MAHALAXMI MEDICINE STORE' (ଶ୍ରୀ ମହାଲକ୍ଷ୍ମୀ ମେଡିସିନ୍ ଷ୍ଟୋର) and 'DR. DEBASIS BEHERA' (ଡା. ଦେବାଶିଷ ବେହେରା) are shown. An auto-rickshaw is parked in front. A man in a white shirt stands on the left, and a child in a red shirt is seen on the right.

The panning motion shows 'SHREE JAGANNATH MEDICINE STORE' (ଶ୍ରୀ ଜଗନ୍ନାଥ ମେଡିସିନ୍ ଷ୍ଟୋର) and 'ANANDA MEDICAL HALL' (ଆନନ୍ଦ ମେଡିକାଲ ହଲ). To the right is 'SAMBHUNATH DIAGNOSTIC & CLINIC' (ଶମ୍ଭୁନାଥ ଡାଇଗ୍ନୋଷ୍ଟିକ ଏଣ୍ଡ କ୍ଲିନିକ). A boy on a bicycle and a man standing under a large umbrella are in the foreground.

A closer look at 'SAMBHUNATH DIAGNOSTIC & CLINIC' (ଶମ୍ଭୁନାଥ ଡାଇଗ୍ନୋଷ୍ଟିକ ଏଣ୍ଡ କ୍ଲିନିକ) featuring 'Dr. Pranay Kumar Patro' and 'Dr. Manas Kumar Behera'. A man in a white shirt is walking in front of the building, and several motorcycles are parked.
A dilapidated brick structure is seen next to the clinic area. A political poster is visible on a utility pole. Two men are sitting under a large colorful umbrella at a roadside stall.

The view moves to 'GEETA X-RAY' (ଗୀତା ଏକ୍ସ-ରେ) and a roadside stall with hanging packets. A man in an orange shirt is working at the stall, and another man is walking past. A few chairs are placed outside the X-ray center.
Moving right, 'RIYA MEDICINE STORE' (ରିୟା ମେଡିସିନ୍ ଷ୍ଟୋର) is visible next to 'GEETA X-RAY'. A man in a white shirt stands outside, and another man is bending down near parked motorcycles.

This frame features 'KALINGA CLINIC' (କଳିଙ୍ଗ କ୍ଲିନିକ) with multiple medicine store signs below, including 'SHREE SAMBHUNATH MEDICINE' (ଶ୍ରୀ ଶମ୍ଭୁନାଥ ମେଡିସିନ୍), 'BIKRAM MEDICINE STORE' (ବିକ୍ରମ ମେଡିସିନ୍ ଷ୍ଟୋର), and 'RANJAN RASMI MEDICINE STORE' (ରଞ୍ଜନ ରଶ୍ମୀ ମେଡିସିନ୍ ଷ୍ଟୋର). A man in a purple shirt is walking toward the right. Many motorcycles are parked.

A closer shot of the 'KALINGA CLINIC' building and 'MAA AMBICA MEDICAL HALL' (ମା' ଅମ୍ବିକା ମେଡିକାଲ ହଲ). People are visible inside the shops. An auto-rickshaw is seen in the distance through an alleyway.

The camera pans towards a side street where 'JAY DURGA CLINIC' (ଜୟ ଦୁର୍ଗା କ୍ଲିନିକ) is located. A man in a pink shirt and a man in a black shirt are at a stall under an umbrella. A woman in a green saree is walking in the distance. A white SUV is parked on the right.
The panning shot shows a multi-story green building with balconies. A covered vehicle is in the foreground, and an auto-rickshaw is parked on the left.

A red building with the sign 'DD POLY CLINIC' (ଡିଡି ପଲି କ୍ଲିନିକ) is center-stage. It lists consultant cardiologists and other doctors. A scooter is parked in front, and some people are visible inside the clinic's entrance.

The view moves past the clinic to a diagnostic center sign, 'HELI DIAGNOSTIC CENTER' (ହେଲି ଡାଇଗ୍ନୋଷ୍ଟିକ ସେଣ୍ଟର). Roadside stalls are set up under large trees. Several people are walking and standing near the stalls.
Temporary stalls are seen under a large tree, with a blue corrugated metal fence in the background. Three men are standing near one of the stalls. The ground is unpaved.

A final view of the roadside stalls and the blue metal fence. A man is sitting at a stall, and another is walking away. A scooter and bicycles are parked nearby. This sequence shows a continuous move past various medical shops and clinics in a busy urban street.
